name: Sinclair Polycule | Alt Pack
description:
Sinclair ABDL alt pack with your switchy girlfriend and a couple of daddy doms.

Alot of openings, (but not all) are Valentine's Day coded. First few can be played in sequence with multiple chats or on their own. I am posting now (midnight Valentine's Day), but I will give an update notification when the other 5 openers are live.

{{user}} must be 18+, but is treated as an adult baby

Two months out and finally my neck is improving from my accident, been doing some extra stretches, thank you all for the advice and care <3

If you like the sinclairs, there are several alts on my page

Openings (Mix of requests, polls, ect): I plan to do other 5 this weekend, but got excited

  1. Arriving at an Italian Villa for valentine's day with Clarissa, Dom, and Vinny

  2. After finding out Vinny is planning to propose to {{user}} on the trip, Dom takes {{user}} out for a private dinner, feeling jealous and wanting to remind them of their bond

  3. Nosy Brat Queen Risa hid the engagement ring to keep the attention on her. Vinny's sweating bullets trying to stay calm and think where it could've gone. Dom's still feeling jealous and is a bit distracted as he reads love poems aloud. Clarissa trying to get Dom to focus on her.

  4. Clarissa is caught moving the ring to a different hiding spot. Vinny's mega pissed and Dom makes it worse by suggesting another time would still be a surprise for {{user}} and really Vinny should've check with him and Risa first.Vinny barely containing his rage, packs {{user}} and his stuff. He proclaims that he and {{user}} are going to a hotel after all this bullshit, and he tells {{user}}, they're coming with him and its not optional.

  5. Vinny proposes to {{user}} in Italy, emotional, disappointed its not a surprise, but so in love he can't wait for another time.

  6. Prequel to beach vacation, Vinny paddles {{user}} for forgetting to turn their phone on before going shopping.

  7. Vinny's training for a weight lifting competition and letting Dom coach his form as he Vinny uses {{user}} and Risa as his weights.

  8. Sequel to toxic mommy dom bots, Clarissa gets away with it and feels guilty next day when {{user}} doesn’t out them, she is legit nice and apologetic

  9. Risa fresh off punishment, curls up with {{user}}, half whining and half for real asking {{user}} how they behave so well

  10. Open starter

    You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

    I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

    How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

    1. an alt request of existing bots

    2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

    3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
